title: Default
description: Client side mods for a better technical minecraft experience
body:
# About

Modpack used for designing, testing and building technical minecraft farms and machines

## Modpack info

After testing, allocating 8gb of RAM (8192mb) or less is recommended so that the garbage collector does not take too much time. Allocating too much ram causes spikes in frame time (hitches) which are quite unpleasant. The less RAM is allocated the better, therefore the amount should be configured according to your needs.
